cards_in_stack_snippets:
const inputColumn = stack([ card('Nutzung', `
${vm.usageHtml}
`, 'green'), card('Leitungsart / Randbedingungen', `
${vm.lineHtml}
`, 'green'), card('Entwässerungsgegenstände', stack([ `
${vm.fixtureInputHtml}
`, `
${renderWastewaterFixtures(r.fixtures || [])}
` ].join(''))

const inputColumn = stack([ card('Berechnungsart', `
${vm.basisHtml}
`, 'purple'), card(vm.holdingOptionsTitle, `
${vm.holdingOptionsHtml}
`, 'purple'), card('Anlagenvolumen', `
${vm.volumeFieldsHtml}
`, 'purple'), card('Temperaturen / Stoffwerte', `
${vm.temperatureFieldsHtml}
`, 'purple'), card('Druckdaten', `
${vm.pressureFieldsHtml}
`, 'purple'), `
${vm.savedRecordsHtml}
` ].join(''))

const inputColumn = stack([ card('Berechnungsart', stack([ `
${segmented('calculationMode', vm.bufferModeOptions, s.calculationMode, { accent: vm.accent })}
`, '

Die Auslegung kann die Mindestlaufzeit von Verdichtern, den Abtaubetrieb luftgekühlter Wärmepumpen oder eine definierte Kälte-/Wärmevorlage betrachten.

' ].join(''))

css_gap_rules.selector: /* Phase 35A: RC retest UI contract hardening. Keep spacing, menu sizing and result rows globally consistent after 34D rebuild. */ .module-content, .module-content > *, .tc-stack, .card, .tc-card, .card__body, .tc-card__body, .result-card__body, .result-list, .result-groups, .inline-stats, .line-section-list, .saved-record-list, [data-platform-dynamic], [data-pipe-dynamic], [data-ph-dynamic], [data-buffer-dynamic], [data-hx-dynamic], [data-dw-dynamic]
/* Wastewater: direct dynamic wrappers inside module columns need the same rhythm as cards. */ .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .span-6 > [data-ww-dynamic]
/* Do not stack vertical margins inside card bodies; spacing is gap-owned. */ .card__body > *, .tc-card__body > *, .result-card__body > *, .tc-stack > *

/* Phase 36Q.5: complete dynamic wrapper display reset */ [data-ww-dynamic="usage"], [data-ww-dynamic="line-fields"], [data-ww-dynamic="fixture-inputs"], [data-ww-dynamic="fixtures"], [data-ww-dynamic="additional-flows"], [data-ww-dynamic="result"]
/* Phase 36Q.4: wastewater follows global spacing only. */ .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .card, .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .result-card
/* Renderer layout: module-content owns the 12-column grid; all direct module blocks use the central 8px gap. */ .module-content
/* Phase 36Q.4: renderer module columns use the same gap variable as cards. */ .module-content, .module-view, .tc-grid
